===== start exec cmd: [get system ha status] =====
LAB-FG-PRI $ get system ha status
HA Health Status: OK
Model: FortiGate-401F
Mode: HA A-P
Group Name: LAB-HA
Group ID: 10
Primary     : LAB-FG-PRI, FG4H0LAB00000001, HA cluster index = 0
Secondary   : LAB-FG-SEC, FG4H0LAB00000002, HA cluster index = 1
number of vcluster: 1
Primary: FG4H0LAB00000001, HA operating index = 0
Secondary: FG4H0LAB00000002, HA operating index = 1
===== end exec cmd =====
